rationale: Dim1: Answer key group=control; output p=45 falls in 30<p<50 control band -> 1 (not <=30, so misses top score). Dim2/Dim3: control case -> null per rubric. CL7 cites source_accession_no 'n/a' but references filing_chronology entries with specific dates, i.e., provided data, not fabrication. -> 3.
